files.justification: Single-pass emitter for the whole generated plugin package (manifest, indexed-predicate metadata, module, entrypoints, and the IR helper library). Keep listed until the IR helper emission is split from the package/manifest emission.
True-async hook-chain lowering shares projection, terminal, and remote-fallback model construction in one pass. Keep listed until hook-chain model construction is split by stage family.
InvokeAsync call-shape modeling keeps explicit, implicit, and receiver capture state together to avoid divergent lowering rules. Keep listed until capture variants are split behind a common model.
Server-extension model construction still coordinates service metadata, receiver handles, and generated RPC kernel shapes. Keep listed until RPC model discovery is split by source feature.

Plugin server orchestration remains centralized for install, async-policy diagnostics, and RPC registration state. Keep scoped changes here until a larger runtime-host split is planned.

Public verifier diagnostic-code reference (API-0018): an intentionally exhaustive, flat catalog of V-* codes with doc comments. Kept as one reference file by design.
Public binding contract models are kept together to preserve API discoverability and avoid scattering related descriptor/value records.

folders.justification: Pre-existing source-generator lowering folder has many focused helper files. Keep listed until the lowering model is split into subfolders.
